title: CIIF - Craftable Invisible Item Frames
description: This mod allows you to craft invisible item frames and use them in a convenient way!
body:
This mod works on servers without the need for players to have it on their client.

You only need this mod on your client if you want to use it in singleplayer.

 

Features

- The invisible item frames are visible as long as there is no item in them to prevent users from losing them

- As soon as an item is placed inside of them they turn invisible

- The item frames have a lore and enchantment glint to distinguish them from normal item frames

 

Crafting

A invisible item frame and a invisible glow item frame can be crafted with the following recipes:


 

Credits

Credits go to Siphalor for creating his nbt-crafting mod that I'm using in this mod to create the crafting recipes.
